steps.t: Fâsh is in the caverns beneath Isengard, accessible by a door directly north of the tower. Once in the depths, you should take the sloping paths downw…
Barkh is in the kitchens beneath Isengard, south-west of the main cavern. Fâsh has sent you to help out in the kitchens once again.
The floor of the kitchen is covered in slop. Barkh has given you a dirty rag and wants you to clean the slop up off the floor.
Dulan in the kitchens has tried to catch your eye. You should talk to Dulan and see what he wants.
Uruk-hai meals can be found on the tables in the kitchens below Isengard. Dulan has secretly given you a small quantity of poison and wants you to add…
Slop covers the floor of the kitchens below Isengard. Barkh wants you to clean up the slop.
It is time for you to squeeze out the dirty rag into the slop bucket in the kitchens.
Barkh is in the kitchens below Isengard, south-west of the main cavern.
Barkh wants you to fill a pan from the slop bucket in the kitchens and carry it to the bucket in the dungeons from where the prisoners are fed, as you…
Baldgar wants to speak with you. He is in the dungeons below Isengard.
